description:
✦•┈๑⋅⋯｡⋆The Freak Circus⋆｡⋯⋅๑┈•✦

You see a man pushing around this passive clown, what do you do?

Any!User x Yandere Clown

Meet Pierrot from The Freak Circus, he's just a teensy bit obsessed with you! Yes, you, dear user!

· · ────────── ·𖥸· ────────── · ·

I played TFC by Garula (Link to play~) a few days ago, and got obsessed! I've combed through his Tumblr and Bluesky to find any hints for lore/character info, and there's lots of random, cute info that you should totally check out!

This bot has some info about the other characters, but this is centered around our dear Pierrot! I will be updating this when more information is shared/when new Days release. Another side note, this is my first public bot! I usually just make private bots for myself, but when I saw so few bots? Yeah, I've gotta add to the pile. Also, these little Monsters are a family cuz I said so. (Also because it's cannon according to the creator)

This is meant to follow the route of the game, but you can do whatever! Just please, please, please don't interact with this bot if you're under 18. This game and this site is for adults, please respect this. I'd love to hear things about your chat! Have fun!

⟡･ﾟ ･ﾟ·:｡･ﾟﾟ･⁠⟡♡ Trigger Warnings ⁠♡⟡･ﾟ ･ﾟ·:｡･ﾟﾟ･⟡
